## Summary

-

## Validation

- [ ] `npm.cmd run check`
- [ ] UI smoke check, if user-facing
- [ ] Fresh-state and existing saved-state check, if storage or config changed

## Safety And Privacy

- [ ] No secrets, local data, logs, or build artifacts committed
- [ ] API keys stay server-side
- [ ] Child-facing language remains age-appropriate
- [ ] Docs updated for behavior changes
